name: Walton Bus Svc Inc
districts_or_customers: Possibly Indian River SD or other Sussex County, DE districts (unconfirmed)
recent_news: No news found; very small operator in Georgetown, DE with 2 employees and ~$84K revenue per source data.
fit_notes: Micro single-bus owner-operator in Sussex County DE; too small to be a tuck-in on its own but may fit a Delmarva area roll-up. Phyllis Walton as named owner suggests possible succession dynamic.

name: Northeast Charter Sch Bus Svc
owner_or_parent: Affiliated with NorthEast Charter & Tour Co. (Lewiston, ME) - International Motorcoach Group member
districts_or_customers: Maine school districts (contract school transportation and field trips)
recent_news: FMCSA SAFER (June 2026) shows Northeast Charter School Bus Services Inc at 235 Goddard Rd, Lewiston ME with 7 power units / 4 drivers, intrastate-only school operation; the broader NorthEast Charter & Tour group operates ~28 school buses plus 26 charter coaches.
fit_notes: School bus arm of NorthEast Charter & Tour - established Maine charter/school operator with ~28 school buses + 26 motorcoaches. Hybrid school/charter platform of meaningful scale; potentially attractive Maine tuck-in but ownership status (family/founder vs. PE) not confirmed.

name: American Bus Tours Inc
recent_news: No news found. Distinct from American Bus Tours & Charters LLC (Whitewater/Elkhorn, WI). PO Box only address in Cudahy, WI; primarily appears charter-focused rather than dedicated school contractor.
fit_notes: Micro entity (2 employees, PO Box) with charter orientation; unlikely to be a meaningful school-bus tuck-in. Low priority.

name: Journey's Playground Bus LLC
recent_news: No web footprint. Residential address (7617 W Glenbrook Rd, Milwaukee) and 'Playground' branding suggest a daycare/childcare-related shuttle rather than a K-12 school bus contractor.
fit_notes: Almost certainly not a true school-bus contractor; appears to be daycare/childcare transport at residential address. Not a Summit tuck-in target.

name: Strout's Bus Svc
districts_or_customers: MSAD 64 / RSU 64 (Bradford, Corinth, Hudson, Kenduskeag, Stetson, ME)
recent_news: Multi-generational family bus service in Bradford, ME serving SAD/RSU 64. Bob and Elaine Strout purchased the business from his parents; Elaine (the first woman owner/operator school bus driver for SD 64) passed away in 2021 per Bangor Daily News obituary. Current operating status unclear.
fit_notes: Classic multi-generational Maine family route contractor for RSU 64; co-owner's 2021 death + small scale create textbook succession setup, but fleet is likely sub-5 buses - too small as standalone tuck-in, viable only as part of a Maine roll-up.
